1	local M = {}
  2	local config = require('config')
  3	local helpers = require('helpers')
  4	
  5	function M.init()
  6	  config.setup()
  7	  helpers.bootstrap()
  8	end
  9	
 10	function M.reset()
 11	  config.reset()
 12	end
 13	
 14	function M.run(opts)
 15	  opts = opts or {}
 16	  if not config.is_ready() then return end
 17	  for k, v in pairs(opts) do
 18	    helpers.handle(k, v)
 19	  end
 20	end
 21	
 22	function M.status()
 23	  return {
 24	    ready = config.is_ready(),
 25	    runs = helpers.run_count(),
 26	    last = helpers.last_run(),
 27	  }
 28	end
 29	
 30	function M.cleanup()
 31	  helpers.cleanup()
 32	end
 33	
 34	function M.export(name)
 35	  return helpers.export(name)
 36	end
 37	
 38	function M.import(name, data)
 39	  return helpers.import(name, data)
 40	end
 41	
 42	return M

delta.text: The module exports init, run, status, cleanup, export, and import.
